name: design-intake
description: Find and analyze provided design materials (files/links), determine the "source of truth" for UI, and extract checkable rules (screens, components, tokens, states).
default_prompt: Use $design-intake when the task matches the "Design Intake" skill.
triggers: Find and analyze provided design materials (files/links), determine the "source of truth" for UI, and extract checkable rules (screens, components, tokens, states)
